title: GridStatus ERCOT Real Time Adders And Reserves
description:
⚠️ Due to large changes in AS data post RTC+C, we've decide to retired this dataset. The historical data is still available, but will no longer receive updates.
The dataset id of the new dataset is [ercot_real_time_adders](https://www.gridstatus.io/datasets/ercot_real_time_adders). 

___

ERCOT Real-Time ORDC and Reliability Deployment Price Adders and Reserves by SCED Interval

This ERCOT dataset contains the real-time adders and reserve elements in each run of SCED. Deployed ERS and load resources are included, as are RUC/RMR LDL relaxed, and total LASL and HASL.

There are a few common elements in the columm names from ERCOT that can assist in understanding and using this dataset. Let's use RTORPA as an example:

* RT = Real-Time
* OR = Operating Reserves
* PA = Price Adder 

Collectively, these create the column RTORPA, or the Real-Time On-Line Reserve Price Adder. If you replace the OR with OFF you have the Real-Time Off-Line Reserve Price Adder. Swapping in CAP for PA changes the column from Price to Capacity, so RTOFFCAP is Real-Time Off-Line Capacity. Following from these conventions, the Real-Time On-Line Reliability Deployment Price Adder is RTORDPA.

Additional acronyms include:

* CLR = Controllable Load Resource
* RMR = Reliability Must Run
* REG = Regulation
* RRS = Responsive Reserve
* ECRS = ERCOT Contingency Reserve Service
* RUC = Reliabililty Unit Commitment
